description: Your Jenkins instance's built-in (controller) node needs to be reconfigured to follow best practices because heavy builds have been slowing down the Jenkins dashboard. Reconfigure the built-in node with 1 executor, the labels 'controller lightweight', and the usage mode 'Only build jobs with label expressions matching this node'. Verify the configuration by creating a Freestyle project named 'controller-health-check' restricted to the 'controller' label that executes the shell command: echo "Health check running on controller node" && hostname && date && uptime. Login credentials - Username: admin, Password: Admin123!
